root_cause: Between 23:52 UTC on 21 Mar 2017 and 01:14 UTC on 22 Mar 2017, a subset of customers around the South East US may have seen latency and failures accessing Microsoft services including Azure resources. This was due to an infrastructure event impacted by a facilities issue at a 3rd party regional routing site located in South East US. Azure Engineering teams executed standard procedures to redirect traffic and isolate the impacted facility restoring expected routing availability.
impact: Between 23:52 UTC on 21 Mar 2017 and 01:14 UTC on 22 Mar 2017, a subset of customers around the South East US may have seen latency and failures accessing Microsoft services including Azure resources.
